info.name: Regulatory Reporting Platform
info.description: Complete API workflow collection for regulatory reporting platform. Covers auth, report files, validation runs, processing jobs, and role-based authorization. Run in order listed in the collection.

exec: const parseJwt = (token) => { try { const [h,p] = token.split("."); return JSON.parse(atob(p.replace(/-/g, "+").replace(/_/g, "/"))); } catch(e) { return {}; } };
